top_gap_prompt: What is the best data integration for enterprise data engineering teams migrating from legacy ETL tools?
category_long: cloud-native data integration and transformation platform for enterprises

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Matillion lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Matillion's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Matillion is under-represented in third-party 'best data integration' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best data integration for enterprise data engineering teams migrating from legacy ETL tools?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which data integration software should a Data Engineer or ETL Lead at a data-heavy enterprise use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable data integration tools instead of Informatica
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
